summary.lv: Vecākais klientu atbalsta speciālists fintech maksājumu vārtejas uzņēmumā, kas atbalsta klientus onboarding procesā, risina problēmas ar atbildību un pilnveido atbalsta procesus; nepieciešama 2+ gadu pieredze klientu atbalstā.
summary.en: Senior customer support specialist at a fintech payment-gateway provider, supporting clients through onboarding, resolving issues with ownership, and improving support workflows; 2+ years of support experience required.
